task_completion.description: Navigate to the 'User Logon Failures' report in ManageEngine ADAudit Plus
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ManageEngine ADAudit Plus web interface is open in a browser, and the 'User Logon Failures' report is actively displayed.

task_completion.description: Customize the report to show the required columns
task_completion.visual_evidence: The report grid's column headers explicitly include 'User Name', 'Client IP Address', 'Failure Reason', and 'Logon Time'.

task_completion.description: Customize the report to hide the forbidden columns
task_completion.visual_evidence: The report grid's column headers do NOT include 'Domain Name' or 'Logon Type'.

task_completion.description: Save a screenshot of the configured report grid to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file named 'custom_columns.png' is visible in the 'C:\workspace' directory via File Explorer, a save dialog, or an image viewer.

task_completion.description: Export the report to a PDF file at the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file named 'report_layout.pdf' is visible in the 'C:\workspace' directory via File Explorer, a save dialog, or a PDF viewer.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the actual ManageEngine ADAudit Plus web interface
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show a real web browser navigating the ADAudit Plus UI (http://localhost:8081), not a mock-up, text editor, or static HTML file.

integrity.description: Verify the outputs were generated authentically
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshot and PDF should be created using standard OS screenshot tools or the application's native export functionality, not by manually typing data into a word processor or image editor.

integrity.description: Verify the columns were customized via the application's built-in features
integrity.visual_evidence: The UI should reflect genuine interaction with the 'Add/Remove Columns' feature of ADAudit Plus, without signs of direct HTML/DOM manipulation (e.g., misaligned text, mismatched fonts in the headers).

privileged_info_for_vlm: ManageEngine ADAudit Plus is hosted locally at http://localhost:8081. The 'User Logon Failures' report must be customized. Required columns that MUST be visible: 'User Name', 'Client IP Address', 'Failure Reason', 'Logon Time'. Forbidden columns that MUST NOT be visible: 'Domain Name', 'Logon Type'. The final expected outputs are a screenshot saved to 'C:\workspace\custom_columns.png' and a PDF exported to 'C:\workspace\report_layout.pdf'.
